title.rendered: LounGenie Features | ORDER, STASH, CHARGE, CHILL

content.rendered:
Features

ORDER. STASH. CHARGE. CHILL. In One Unit.

LounGenie solves the four problems that cost pool operators the most revenue — at the guest’s seat, in one commercial-grade unit, with zero upfront cost.

$0 Upfront Cost
Solar-Powered Charging
PoolSafe Installs & Services

ORDER

QR ordering at the seat, with dedicated staff alerts.

The Problem

Every time a guest walks to the bar to order, you lose a cabana rental minute and a potential upsell. Your staff can’t cover every lounge chair fast enough during peak hours.

The Solution

Guests scan a QR code to order food and drinks — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. A built-in service call button alerts staff via a touchscreen monitor showing exactly which cabana needs attention. No app download. No POS integration. No added labor.

STASH

A waterproof safe that keeps guests on the deck.

The Problem

Guests drape towels over their belongings and glance back every five minutes. Some skip the pool entirely. Cabana dwell time drops — and so does your per-guest spend.

The Solution

A waterproof safe with a waterproof keypad lets guests lock phones, wallets, and room keys inside the cabana. When guests feel secure, they swim, relax, and stay on the deck far longer. Properties consistently report that STASH is the single feature guests mention most in reviews.

CHARGE

Solar-powered charging — no wiring, no permits.

The Problem

A dead phone means no mobile ordering, no social media posts tagging your property, and no digital room key access. Guests with dying batteries leave the pool to find an outlet — and often don’t come back.

The Solution

Solar panels power the USB charging ports from sunrise to sunset — no wiring, no permits, no electricity cost. When guests can charge poolside, they stop leaving the pool area. And when they stay, they order.

CHILL

Cold drinks at arm’s reach all afternoon.

The Problem

When a guest’s drink gets warm, they have two choices: walk to the bar for a new one or settle for what they have. Either way, you lose an impulse purchase.

The Solution

A removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold at the seat for hours. Cold drinks within arm’s reach encourage high-margin repeat beverage orders throughout the afternoon — without a server needing to check in.

Configurations

Three configurations to match your operations.

Classic

Secure storage + comfort

Waterproof safe, solar USB charging, and removable ice bucket. A practical entry point that solves the most common reasons guests leave the deck early.

F&B Communication Button

Staff alert system included

Everything in Classic, plus a service call button that routes alerts to a dedicated touchscreen monitor — so staff know exactly which cabana needs attention.

2.0

Full QR ordering capability

The most complete configuration. QR codes at the seat print orders on a dedicated PoolSafe printer. Combines every feature of the Classic and F&B Communication models into one seamless guest experience.

In Their Own Words

What operators say after deploying LounGenie.

“Our guests now feel they can safely secure their items in the Pool Safe, and the Food & Beverage call button for service has enhanced our poolside experience by improving service response times.”

Kamiya Woodard
Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott

“Since launch, we have far exceeded our budgeted goals, and the revenue share has been the largest part of that success.”

Raymond Weissert
Director of Operations, The Grove Resort & Waterpark

Zero Upfront Cost

We Install It. We Service It. You Keep The Revenue.

PoolSafe handles the hardware, flies to your property for installation, and manages all ongoing service. Your property earns incremental F&B revenue from Day 1.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection

excerpt.rendered: Explore LounGenie features including QR ordering, waterproof storage, solar charging, and removable cooling built for premium outdoor hospitality seating.

title.rendered: LounGenie | Smart Poolside Revenue & Guest Experience Platform

content.rendered:
Smart Cabana System — Zero Upfront Cost

Turn Premium Seating Into A Revenue Engine, At $0 Upfront

The LounGenie™ smart cabana system combines QR ordering, a waterproof safe, solar-powered USB charging, and a removable ice bucket into one commercial-grade unit. Hotels, resorts, waterparks, and cruise lines see real increases in food and drink revenue — starting Day 1, with no upfront cost.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection
Explore Features
$0 Upfront
Revenue Share Model
Built in Canada

30%+

Average increase in poolside F&B revenue at properties using LounGenie.

No upfront purchase cost · Performance-based revenue share · PoolSafe handles install and service.

Selected Property Logos

Representative Properties and Brands Featured Across Recent Deployment Examples.

This is a curated subset of properties and brands shown across LounGenie deployment imagery and case-study content. It is not an exhaustive list of every venue, portfolio, or relationship.

The Core Problem

Your Pool Deck Is Leaking Revenue Every Hour.

Every pool deck loses revenue the same three ways. Guests leave to charge phones. They skip food orders because no server is nearby. They cut their stay short because they don’t trust leaving valuables on a lounge chair. Every hour a guest walks off the deck is a missed food and beverage opportunity. LounGenie solves all three problems at the guest’s seat.

Guests leave to charge
A dead phone sends guests off the pool deck. Without charging at the seat, they leave — and often don’t come back.
Orders get skipped
When no server is nearby and there’s no easy way to order, guests settle for less and your food and beverage revenue drops.
Valuables send guests home early
Guests who don’t trust leaving their phone and wallet on a lounge chair cut their visit short. Every early departure is lost spend.

How It Works

One Unit. Four Features. Higher Spend Per Guest.

Order

Order at the seat — no app required.

Guests scan a QR code to order food and drinks — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. A service call button alerts staff via a touchscreen monitor showing exactly which cabana needs attention. No app download. No POS integration. No added labor.

Stash

A waterproof safe guests actually use.

Guests lock phones, wallets, and room keys inside the cabana with a waterproof keypad safe. When valuables are secure, guests stay longer and spend more. STASH is consistently the feature guests mention most in reviews.

Charge

Solar-powered charging — no wiring, no permits.

Solar panels power USB charging from sunrise to sunset at no electricity cost. When guests can charge poolside, they stop leaving the deck. And when they stay, they order.

Chill

Cold drinks at arm’s reach drive repeat orders.

A removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold at the seat for hours. Cold beverages within arm’s reach encourage high-margin repeat orders throughout the afternoon — without a server needing to check in.

Guest Journey

A Guest Journey That Increases Dwell Time And Spend.

1
Lock valuables in the built-in safe
They lock their phone, wallet, and room key in the built-in waterproof safe. Guests stop worrying and start relaxing.

2
Plug in and stay charged at the seat
They plug a device into the solar-powered USB charging port. No outlet needed. No leaving the deck.

3
Scan to order, press for service
They scan a QR code to place a food and beverage order, which prints on a dedicated PoolSafe printer. The service call button sends a separate alert to the staff touchscreen showing exactly which cabana needs attention.

4
Drinks stay cold. Guests stay longer.
Their beverages stay cold in the removable ice bucket at arm’s reach. The guest stays longer, orders more, and your servers only move when someone is ready to spend.

Installations

Real Installations Across Resorts And Waterparks.

View full gallery →

The Business Model

We Install It. We Service It. You Keep The Revenue.

The LounGenie™ operates on a revenue-share model — zero upfront cost, zero risk. We provide the hardware, fly to your property for full installation, and handle all ongoing service. You earn more F&B and cabana rental revenue from Day 1. We share in the upside. That’s it.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection

Every Venue Type

Hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, and surf parks.

From a handful of cabanas to hundreds of premium seating areas, LounGenie scales cleanly across every outdoor hospitality environment — modular, solar-powered, and zero upfront cost.

Hotels + Resorts

Upgrade daybeds, cabanas, and reserved lounge zones. Guests spend more when valuables are secure, devices are charged, and ordering is instant.

Waterparks + Attractions

Handle high guest volume with stronger ordering flow and premium seat convenience. When guests stop leaving to charge or order, dwell time — and spend — goes up.

Cruise Lines + Specialty Venues

Weather-rated, solar-powered, and fully modular. LounGenie works in every outdoor premium seating environment, including surf parks, country clubs, and aquatic centers.

Why Guests Spend More

Two behavioral shifts drive stronger revenue.

Guests Stop Leaving The Deck.

When valuables are locked in the waterproof safe and devices are charging, guests stop leaving the pool area. Longer stays mean more ordering windows — more drinks, more food, more spend per visit.

Ordering Becomes Instant.

A QR code or service call button removes the gap between “I want a drink” and “I placed an order.” No flagging servers. No missed sales. No friction.

Partner Testimonials

What Operators Report After Deployment.

“Since the launch of the product, we have far exceeded our budgeted goals and the revenue share has been the largest part of that success.”

Raymond Weissert
Director of Operations, The Grove Resort & Waterpark

“The Food & Beverage call button for service has enhanced our poolside experience as well, improving service response times. It has been very convenient for both our staff and our guests.”

Kamiya Woodard
Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott

“The convenience of having a safe, charging port, and ice bucket inside each cabana with the elegant look and feel of the Pool Safes enabled us to take our cabana experience to the next level.”

Louis R. Cirigliano Jr.
Director of Operations, Breakwater Beach

“We have had a great season and are pleased to say that your PoolSafe product played a big part in that success. Our guests love the convenience and value it provides to their cabana rentals. We’ve seen a positive impact on our F&B sales, and because of this success, we are planning to add new VIP seating locations for the next season.”

Bobby Covach
Cabana/Food & Beverage Director, Hospitality Partner Waterpark

IAAPA Brass Ring Award Recipient

PoolSafe Inc. received this recognition for developing a solution that measurably enhances the guest experience while delivering operational and revenue impact for operators. One of the highest honors in the attractions and hospitality industry.

Side-by-Side Comparison

Standard cabana vs. LounGenie-equipped cabana.

Category Standard Cabana ✓ With LounGenie
Valuables Guest worries or leaves early ✓ Locked in a waterproof safe
Phone Charging Guest leaves the deck ✓ Solar-powered USB charging at the seat
Ordering Food & Drinks Flag down a server or walk to the bar ✓ Service call button alerts staff · QR scan prints order on PoolSafe printer
Cold Beverages Drinks warm up quickly ✓ Removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold for hours
Revenue per Cabana Minimal — passive furniture ✓ Incremental F&B captured throughout the day
Upfront Cost to Property N/A ✓ $0 — revenue share model
Service & Repairs Property handles repairs ✓ PoolSafe handles full installation and service

FAQ

Operator Questions, Answered.

Is there any upfront cost?

No. LounGenie operates on a revenue-share model. Zero capital outlay, zero risk. We provide the hardware, installation, and ongoing service.

Is installation really included?

Yes. Our team flies to your property for on-site installation. No electrical wiring, no permits, no downtime required — the system is solar-powered and fully modular.

What type of properties does LounGenie serve?

Hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, surf parks, country clubs, and municipal aquatic centers. If you have premium outdoor seating, LounGenie fits.

What does each unit include?

STASH (waterproof keypad safe), CHARGE (solar USB ports), CHILL (removable ice bucket), and ORDER (QR code and/or service call button, depending on configuration).

How To Get Started

Three steps from conversation to launch.

1. We assess your property.

We review your layout, cabana count, and premium seating areas.

2. We handle full installation.

No wiring, no permits, no downtime. Our team comes to your property.

3. You earn from Day 1.

New F&B revenue starts from the first day guests interact with the units.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection
See Full Feature Set

title.rendered: About LounGenie | Hospitality Technology for Premium Seating

content.rendered:
About LounGenie

Built In Canada. Installed And Serviced By PoolSafe.

PoolSafe Inc. (TSX-V: POOL) designs and builds the LounGenie™ — the award-winning cabana amenity that lets guests order food, charge their phone, and lock up their valuables right from their seat. We work with hotels, resorts, waterparks, and cruise lines worldwide to help them earn more from their pool decks.

IAAPA Brass Ring Award Recipient
TSX-V: POOL
$0 Upfront Model

Our Story

Built to solve poolside revenue leakage.

PoolSafe Inc. was founded to solve the most persistent revenue leak in outdoor hospitality: guests who leave the deck. When valuables feel exposed, phones die, and ordering requires walking to a bar, guests spend less and leave earlier. LounGenie addresses all three at the seat — without adding complexity to your operations.

Designed and built in North York, Ontario, LounGenie is a commercial-grade hospitality unit deployed across leading waterparks, hotels, resorts, and cruise lines worldwide. Our units are installed and serviced by PoolSafe — at zero upfront cost to the property.

Mission

Unlock new revenue opportunities.

At PoolSafe Inc., we help hotels and waterparks earn more at the pool while giving guests a better experience. We build smart, practical cabana units that work out of the box — no extra staff, no added complexity.

Vision

As essential as a hotel wall safe.

PoolSafe Inc. envisions a future where the LounGenie™ is as essential to a pool deck as a wall safe is to a hotel room — a standard guest amenity that operators and guests both expect.

IAAPA Brass Ring Award

Award-Winning Innovation

The IAAPA Brass Ring Award is one of the highest honors in the attractions and hospitality industry. PoolSafe Inc. received this recognition for developing a solution that measurably enhances the guest experience while delivering operational and revenue impact for operators.

Partner Testimonials

What operators report after implementation.

“We have had a great season and are pleased to say that your PoolSafe product played a big part in that success. Our guests love the convenience and value it provides to their cabana rentals. We’ve seen a positive impact on our F&B sales, and because of this success, we are planning to add new VIP seating locations for the next season to accommodate more of your units.”

Bobby Covach
Cabana/Food & Beverage Director, Cowabunga Bay Waterpark

“Since the launch of the product, we have far exceeded our budgeted goals and the revenue share has been the largest part of that success.”

Raymond Weissert
Director of Operations, The Grove Resort & Waterpark

“The overall sense of security our guests now feel, knowing they can safely secure their items in the Pool Safe, and the Food & Beverage call button for service have enhanced our poolside experience.”

Kamiya Woodard
Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott

“The convenience of having a safe, charging port, and ice bucket inside each cabana with the elegant look and feel of the Pool Safes enabled us to take our cabana experience to the next level.”

Louis R. Cirigliano Jr.
Director of Operations, Breakwater Beach

Zero Upfront Cost

Ready to bring LounGenie to your property?

We assess your layout, handle full installation, and manage all ongoing service. You earn incremental F&B revenue from Day 1, with no upfront capital outlay.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection
Explore Features

title.rendered: Contact LounGenie | Request a Poolside Revenue Demo

content.rendered:
Contact LounGenie

Find out what your property can earn.

The smart cabana system for waterparks, resorts, hotels, and cruise lines. We will build your free revenue projection — personally, based on your property.

Zero Upfront CostPoolSafe Handles InstallationIAAPA Brass Ring Award Recipient

How It Works — 4 Steps

Simple. Personal. Fast.

1
Tell Us About Your Property

Share what you operate — waterpark, resort, hotel, or cruise line — and how many cabanas, daybeds, or premium seating zones you have.

2
Receive Your Free Revenue Projection

Our team personally reviews every submission and builds a projection specific to your property layout and seating capacity. Most conversations run 20 to 30 minutes.

3
Confirm Your Rollout Plan

We walk through placement, unit options, and program structure together.

4
We Install. You Launch.

No upfront capital. No permits. No wiring. Our team handles full on-site installation and your guests start experiencing Day 1.

Why Contact Before Peak Season

Peak season installation windows fill up. The properties that move first launch on time, fully branded, and ready to capture food and beverage demand from day one. Units can be customized to match your property — any color, your logo, and branded advertising panels available.

Contact Details

PoolSafe Inc.

416-630-2444  ·  info@poolsafeinc.com

Start the conversation.

Complete the form and our team will respond within one business day with a tailored revenue projection for your property.

title.rendered: LounGenie Board of Directors | Pool Safe Inc. Governance

content.rendered:
Governance

Board of Directors

Strategic leadership guiding Pool Safe Inc.’s mission to transform premium outdoor seating worldwide through innovation and governance excellence.

Meet the LounGenie Leadership Team

The LounGenie leadership team brings decades of experience across hospitality, finance, and marketing. These are the strategic minds guiding Pool Safe Inc.’s mission to transform premium seating worldwide.

David Berger

Chief Executive Officer

Mr. David Berger is Executive Chairman and CEO, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Berger was formerly the Director of Operations of Kiddie Ride Entertainment Limited, a company he founded to create fun and exciting amusement rides for children, located in shopping malls across southern Ontario. Prior to Kiddie Ride, Mr. Berger held the position of Managing Director at Jodami Enterprises Limited, an Engineering company that provided plumbing and electrical supplies across the Greater Toronto Area.

Steven Glaser

COO, CFO & Director

Mr. Steven Glaser is Chief Operating Officer, Chief Financial Officer and Director, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Glaser is a financial service executive with a diverse background in corporate finance, communications and governance for private and public companies. He spent the last eight years working in the corporate finance and investment banking arena focused on assisting late stage private and early stage public companies with strategic planning and capital raising. Prior to that, Mr. Glaser spent seven years as Vice President Corporate Affairs of Azure Dynamics Corporation. He was responsible for the company’s corporate governance, its domestic and international stock exchange listings, as well as the build-out of the company’s Investor Relations division. Mr. Glaser holds a Bachelor of Administrative Studies degree as well as an M.B.A. in finance.

Steven Mintz

Director

Mr. Steven Mintz is Director, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Mintz is a graduate from the University of Toronto and obtained his C.A. designation in June of 1992. Between 1992 and 1997, Mr. Mintz was employed by a boutique bankruptcy and insolvency firm. He obtained his Trustee in Bankruptcy license in 1995. Since January 1997 he has been a self-employed financial consultant, serving private individuals and companies as well as public companies in a variety of industries, including mining, oil and gas, real estate and investment strategies. He is currently a director of 22 Capital Corp, Everton Resources Inc., Mooncor Oil and Gas Corp. and Portage Biotech Inc.

Gillian Deacon

Marketing Executive

Ms. Deacon brings over 15 years of integrated marketing experience across brand, experiential, partnership and content marketing. Ms. Deacon is currently the Vice President of Partnership Marketing for the Arizona Cardinals Football Club overseeing the day-to-day operations and direct supervision to the corporate partnership activation and service staff and all related functions. Prior to joining the Cardinals, Ms. Deacon was located in New York City as the Vice President, Solutions and Operations at Oak View Group (Nov 2020 – April 2025), the largest developer of sports and entertainment facilities in the world, with over $5 billion committed spend on new arena developments in various prime global locales. Leading to OVG, Ms. Deacon drove the initial formation and further growth, and development of the Wasserman Experience division in Canada, an industry leading global sports, entertainment and lifestyle company working with some of the world’s most iconic brands, properties and talent.

Robert Pratt

Director

Mr. Pratt is currently the President of R. Pratt Consulting Ltd. From 2018-2024 he was President and Chief Operating Officer at Sandman Hotel Group and Sutton Place Hotels, a Canadian hotel chain. From October 2015 until July 2018, Mr. Pratt was the President of One Lodging Management, responsible for the day-to-day operations of 119 properties.

Board and Governance Inquiries

Email: info@poolsafeinc.com
Phone: +1 (416) 630-2444

title.rendered: LounGenie Press Releases | Pool Safe News & Announcements

content.rendered:
📰 Press Releases

Stay informed on LounGenie’s newest partnerships, product launches, and corporate milestones.

POOL SAFE ADDS INDUSTRIALIST DAVID DEACON AS EXECUTIVE CHAIRMAN

Toronto, Ontario, March 2, 2026 – Pool Safe Inc. (“Pool Safe” or the “Company”) (TSXV: POOL) is pleased to announce the appointment of Mr. David Deacon as Executive Chairman of the Company’s Board of Directors. Mr. Deacon’s appointment is effective immediately, succeeding Mr. David Berger, who will continue to serve as the Company’s Chief Executive Officer and Director of the Company. […]


Read More
